name: Candied Orange Peel
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the oranges thoroughly.
2. Cut each orange into halves.
3. Squeeze out the juice as needed for other purposes.
4. Place the orange halves in a large saucepan and cover with cold water.
5. Heat over high heat until it reaches a boil, then add more cold water to cover again and bring back to a boil. Drain well.
6. Repeat this heating process four more times in total.
7. Scoop out any remaining pulp from the oranges.
8. Cut the orange halves into strips that are 1/4 inch wide.
9. Dissolve 2 cups of sugar in 1 cup boiling water by stirring until completely combined.
10. Add the orange strips to the mixture and heat over medium until all liquid evaporates, ensuring not to let them scorch.
11. Allow cooling, then roll each strip through remaining sugar before placing on waxed paper to dry.
12. Package dried strips in airtight containers for storage.
